## Code Quality

- [ ] Type hints on all functions (`mypy avatarfactory` clean)
- [ ] Line length ≤ 100 characters (`black avatarfactory tests --check`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check avatarfactory tests`)
- [ ] No breaking changes to public APIs

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated if needed
- [ ] Docstrings added / updated for new public APIs
- [ ] Connector docs added (`docs/connectors/<platform>.md`) if applicable
